case.title: NORTHWESTERN PACIFIC R.R. v. INTERSTATE COMM. COMM'N

opinion.h1: NORTHWESTERN PACIFIC R.R. v. INTERSTATE COMM. COMM'N, 379 U.S. 132 (1964)
opinion.h4: NORTHWESTERN PACIFIC RAILROAD CO. v. INTERSTATE COMMERCE COMMISSION ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 381. Decided November 23, 1964.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Orrick, Robert B. Hummel, Arthur J. Murphy, Jr., and Robert W. Ginnane for the Interstate Commerce Commission et al.; J. Thomason Phelps for Public Utilities Commission of California et al.; Boris H. Lakusta for the City of San Rafael et al.; and Frederick G. Pfrommer for Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway Co., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
